title: attribution — PHP attribute contracts
description: Two class-level attributes for listener discovery. `#[AsAttributionListener]` subscribes to attribution-profile lifecycle events (create / identify / convert / churn / restore / merge / reset). `#[AsTouchpointListener]` subscribes specifically to the high-volume touchpoint-captured event — separated because downstream consumers may want touchpoints WITHOUT profile events (e.g. referrals module cares about touchpoints only). Discovery loader picks up each class at boot + wires the declared events.

attributes.name: AsAttributionListener
attributes.description: Marks a service as a subscriber to attribution-profile lifecycle events (AttributionCreated / AttributionUpdated / AttributionFirstTouchRecorded / AttributionLastTouchUpdated / AttributionSubjectIdentified / AttributionConverted / AttributionChurned / AttributionRestored / AttributionSessionRefreshed / AttributionMerged / AttributionResetRequested / AttributionResetConfirmed / AttributionDeleted / AttributionConsentSnapshotUpdated / AttributionCampaignRollupComputed / AttributionTouchpointCountReconciled). Does NOT include AttributionTouchpointCaptured or AttributionSuppressedByConsent — those have their own attribute so high-volume consumers can opt in independently.

params.name: events
params.description: Array of event short names (`AttributionCreated`, `AttributionConverted`, `AttributionMerged`, …). Empty = subscribe to every `Academorix\Growth\Attribution\Events\Attribution*` event EXCEPT the two high-volume ones (touchpoint + suppressed-by-consent). Names resolve against events.json at boot; typos abort boot with a discovery error.

params.name: queue
params.description: Optional queue override. Falls back to the event's default queue (see events.json). AttributionResetRequested / AttributionResetConfirmed / AttributionSubjectIdentified consumers should override to `attribution-critical`.

params.name: priority
params.description: Handler ordering within a single event. Lower runs first. The internal MergeAnonymousAttributionsOnSubjectIdentified hook declares priority 50 so it runs BEFORE marketing/analytics listeners see the identified profile.

attributes.name: AsTouchpointListener
attributes.description: Marks a service as a subscriber to the high-volume touchpoint events (AttributionTouchpointCaptured + AttributionSuppressedByConsent). Separated from AsAttributionListener because these fire on EVERY attribution-bearing request — most consumers should NOT subscribe to them. Only consumers that specifically care about touchpoint-level fanout (referrals matching referral links, analytics real-time-funnel dashboards) should use this attribute.

params.name: events
params.description: Empty = subscribe to AttributionTouchpointCaptured only (not AttributionSuppressedByConsent — that's a compliance signal, opt-in explicitly). Pass ['AttributionTouchpointCaptured', 'AttributionSuppressedByConsent'] for both.

params.name: queue
params.description: Optional queue override. Touchpoint listeners default to `attribution-high-volume` — do NOT route to `notifications` (would flood the queue).

params.name: sample_rate
params.description: Per-listener sampling multiplier. 0.1 = only invoke on 10% of touchpoints. Global sampling still applies via feature-flags::attribution.touchpoint_analytics_sampled.
